name: Drechter Kucka (Funnel Cake)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg, then add the milk.
2. Sift together the salt, sugar, flour, and baking powder.
3. Add the eggs and milk to the sifted ingredients.
4. Beat until smooth.
5. Pour the batter into a funnel, holding your finger over the bottom.
6. Allow the batter to run out of the funnel into deep fat that is 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Make swirls in the fat from the center out.
8. Cook until golden brown.
9. Drain on paper.
10. Serve with powdered sugar.
